Now I post 5 videos daily—before it was 1 per week.\""}],["$","blockquote","97",{"style":{"borderLeft":"3px solid #22d3ee","paddingLeft":"20px","margin":"20px 0","color":"#a3a3a3","fontStyle":"italic"},"children":"\"HeyGen的翻译功能太强了，一条中文视频自动生成英文版，粉丝翻了3倍。\""}],["$","blockquote","98",{"style":{"borderLeft":"3px solid #22d3ee","paddingLeft":"20px","margin":"20px 0","color":"#a3a3a3","fontStyle":"italic"},"children":"— *@出海笔记, Zhihu* | 👍 5.2K"}],["$","p","99",{"style":{"fontSize":"17px","lineHeight":1.8,"color":"#d4d4d4","margin":"16px 0"},"children":[">"]}],["$","blockquote","100",{"style":{"borderLeft":"3px solid #22d3ee","paddingLeft":"20px","margin":"20px 0","color":"#a3a3a3","fontStyle":"italic"},"children":"**Translation:** \"HeyGen's translation is incredible. One Chinese video auto-generates English version—followers tripled.\""}],["$","blockquote","102",{"style":{"borderLeft":"3px solid #22d3ee","paddingLeft":"20px","margin":"20px 0","color":"#a3a3a3","fontStyle":"italic"},"children":"\"Reality check: 大部分AI数字人直播还是很容易被识别，平台已经在限流了。\""}],["$","blockquote","103",{"style":{"borderLeft":"3px solid #22d3ee","paddingLeft":"20px","margin":"20px 0","color":"#a3a3a3","fontStyle":"italic"},"children":"— *@电商老司机, Douban* | 👍 3.1K"}],["$","p","104",{"style":{"fontSize":"17px","lineHeight":1.8,"color":"#d4d4d4","margin":"16px 0"},"children":[">"]}],["$","blockquote","105",{"style":{"borderLeft":"3px solid #22d3ee","paddingLeft":"20px","margin":"20px 0","color":"#a3a3a3","fontStyle":"italic"},"children":"**Translation:** \"Reality check: Most AI avatar livestreams are still easily detected, platforms are already throttling them.\""}],["$","blockquote","107",{"style":{"borderLeft":"3px solid #22d3ee","paddingLeft":"20px","margin":"20px 0","color":"#a3a3a3","fontStyle":"italic"},"children":"\"Digital humans are just the beginning. Wait until AI agents can interact with viewers in real-time with actual intelligence.\""}],["$","blockquote","108",{"style":{"borderLeft":"3px solid #22d3ee","paddingLeft":"20px","margin":"20px 0","color":"#a3a3a3","fontStyle":"italic"},"children":"— *@FutureOfContent, Twitter/X* | ❤️ 2.4K"}],["$","h2","110",{"style":{"fontSize":"30px","fontWeight":600,"marginTop":"48px","marginBottom":"24px","color":"#e5e5e5","borderBottom":"1px solid #1a1a1a","paddingBottom":"12px"},"children":"The ByteDance Factor: Seedance 2.0 Changes the Game"}],["$","p","112",{"style":{"fontSize":"17px","lineHeight":1.8,"color":"#d4d4d4","margin":"16px 0"},"children":["ByteDance's April 2026 release of ",["$","strong","1",{"style":{"color":"#e5e5e5"},"children":"Seedance 2.0 API"}]," represents a strategic inflection point. Previously available only to enterprise partners with million-yuan minimum commitments, the service is now open to all developers."]}],["$","h4","114",{"style":{"fontSize":"18px","fontWeight":600,"marginTop":"24px","marginBottom":"12px","color":"#e5e5e5"},"children":"Key Capabilities:"}],["$","ul","119",{"style":{"margin":"20px 0","paddingLeft":"24px","color":"#d4d4d4"},"children":[["$","li","115",{"style":{"margin":"10px 0","lineHeight":1.7},"children":"Multi-modal input (text, image, audio, video)"}],["$","li","116",{"style":{"margin":"10px 0","lineHeight":1.7},"children":"Industry-first safety standards for portrait protection"}],["$","li","117",{"style":{"margin":"10px 0","lineHeight":1.7},"children":"Enhanced physics simulation for realistic motion"}],["$","li","118",{"style":{"margin":"10px 0","lineHeight":1.7},"children":"Commercial licensing included"}]]}],["$","h2","120",{"style":{"fontSize":"30px","fontWeight":600,"marginTop":"48px","marginBottom":"24px","color":"#e5e5e5","borderBottom":"1px solid #1a1a1a","paddingBottom":"12px"},"children":"Why This Matters Globally"}],["$","p","122",{"style":{"fontSize":"17px","lineHeight":1.8,"color":"#d4d4d4","margin":"16px 0"},"children":["China's 410 million topic views on AI avatars isn't just a statistic—it's a signal that we're entering a new phase of content creation. The \"faceless creator\" economy, powered by AI avatars, is enabling a generation of entrepreneurs to build media businesses at unprecedented scale."]}],["$","h4","124",{"style":{"fontSize":"18px","fontWeight":600,"marginTop":"24px","marginBottom":"12px","color":"#e5e5e5"},"children":"The question isn't whether AI avatars will transform content creation. They already are."}],["$","p","126",{"style":{"fontSize":"17px","lineHeight":1.8,"color":"#d4d4d4","margin":"16px 0"},"children":["For Western observers, China's AI avatar explosion offers a window into the future.
